rulings.Case Title: RORY MCCARTHY VS. TRUSTEES OF UA LOCAL 38 DBA KNOCTI HARBOR RESORT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Further Written Discovery Responses And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And His Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 7, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT TRUSTEES OF UA LOCAL 38 DBA KONOCTI HARBOR RESORT, UA LOCAL 38 CONVALESCENT TRUST FUND'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Written Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Counsel. GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFFS TO PROVIDE RESPONSES TO THE 18 SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND THE 6 REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF AND/OR PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL MUST PAY $1,015 IN SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANTS' ATTORNEYS WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANTS TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RORY MCCARTHY VS. TRUSTEES OF UA LOCAL 38 DBA KNOCTI HARBOR RESORT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Furhter Written Discovery Responses And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And His Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 7, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT TRUSTEES OF UA LOCAL 38 DBA KONOCTI HARBOR RESORT, UA LOCAL 38 CONVALESCENT TRUST FUND'S Motion To Compel Further Written Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Counsel. GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFFS TO PROVIDE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AND FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1. PLAINTIFF AND/OR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MUST PAY $2,000 IN SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANTS' ATTORNEYS. RESPONSES AND SANCTIONS ARE DUE WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANTS TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RENE LA MAR VS. W.B. COYLE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS/PENDENCY OF ACTION
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 7, 2011, line 6, DEFENDANT SPOTLIGHT PROPERTIES LLC'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS/PENDENCY OF ACTION. ALTHOUGH EXPUNGMENT IS MOOT, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT FINDS THE MOTION HAS MERIT AND THAT THE LIS PENDENS WAS FILED IMPROPERLY. PLAINTIFF MUST PAY $1,978 ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS TO DEFENDANT SPOTLIGHT WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: YOLANDA MIANI, ET AL VS. LABIB MAJID BARANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 7, 2011, line 7, DEFENDANT LONE OAK FUND, LLC, A CORPORATION, ABBASI, A.S. TRUSTEE, CARDIOVASCULAR ASSOCIATES DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.
